name: Running Hunters
original_name: 全员加速中之赏金猎人
overview: Set in 1920s Yongxin City, the mysterious death of an antique shop owner and the theft of priceless relics ignite a tense battle. Singer Du Qing, Detective Hanzhou, and Luo Ting must overcome mistrust and work together to protect the artifacts and outwit powerful enemies.

trailers.title: 【Full Movie】全员加速中之赏金猎人Running Hunters 🪙Run For Time & Detective College Collaboration!
